cases.prompt: 리텐션 분석해줘. 가입 코호트 커브랑 어디서 빠져나가는지 보고 싶어.

assertions.text: Identifies funnel drop-off / where users leave.
Distinguishes true retention from vanity (cumulative) retention.

cases.prompt: Analyze cohorts and churn drivers from our PostHog data with RFM segments.

assertions.text: Produces RFM segments and leading churn indicators.
Provides a SQL cohort template or a stdlib Python calculator.
